# Quivers
# https://revengeofthefallengame.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Quivers&prop=wikitext

The quiver is the ability of the archer. It is used to cause damage to enemies in a line and causes debuffs (mostly paralyzes).
<div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 20px 20px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Speciality</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Primal</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = LimbsplitQuiver.png
| link = Limbsplit Quiver
| text = Limbsplit Quiver
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Legendary</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
|{{ImageBlack
| file = OdinsRavens.png
| link = Odin's Ravens
| text = Odin's Ravens
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = DreadstumpsCannon.png
| link = Dreadstump's Cannon
| text = Dreadstump's Cannon
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge2
| file = RedBeehemothQuiver.png
| link = Red Beehemoth Quiver
| text = Red Beehemoth Quiver
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = QuiverOfTheShadows.png
| link = Quiver of the Shadows
| text = Quiver of the Shadows
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = QuiverOfThunder.png
| link = Quiver of Thunder
| text = Quiver of Thunder
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Heroic</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = QuiverOfTheAsgardRuins.png
| link = Quiver of the Asgard Ruins
| text = Quiver of the Asgard Ruins
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = LeviathansRepentance.png
| link = Leviathan's Repentance
| text = Leviathan's Repentance
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = LightningGodQuiver.png
| link = Lightning God Quiver
| text = Lightning God Quiver
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge2
| file = BlueBeehemothQuiver.png
| link = Blue Beehemoth Quiver
| text = Blue Beehemoth Quiver
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = FreezingQuiver.png
| link = Freezing Quiver
| text = Freezing Quiver
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Artifact</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
|{{ImageBlack
| file = TheSplitArrow.png
| link = The Split Arrow
| text = The Split Arrow
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Unique</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
|{{ImageBlackLarge2
| file = YellowBeehemothQuiver.png
| link = Yellow Beehemoth Quiver
| text = Yellow Beehemoth Quiver
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Galactic</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
|{{ImageBlack
| file = StardustQuiver.png
| link = Stardust Quiver
| text = Stardust Quiver
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Uncommon</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
|{{ImageBlack
| file = GoldenQuiver.png
| link = Golden Quiver
| text = Golden Quiver
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = QuiverOfElvishMastery.png
| link = Quiver of Elvish Mastery
| text = Quiver of Elvish Mastery
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Normal</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
|{{ImageBlack
| file = MagicQuiver.png
| link = Magic Quiver
| text = Magic Quiver
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = ReinforcedQuiver.png
| link = Reinforced Quiver
| text = Reinforced Quiver
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = IronQuiver.png
| link = Iron Quiver
| text = Iron Quiver
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = ElvencraftQuiver.png
| link = Elvencraft Quiver
| text = Elvencraft Quiver
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = MagesteelQuiver.png
| link = Magesteel Quiver
| text = Magesteel Quiver
}}
|}
</div>

<div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 20px 20px; padding: 15px;">
